title: Heavenly Restriction for SVM Powers
description: An add-on for the Datapack Super Powers by LordGacie. Adds a new Power inspired by the JJK Heavenly Restriction system.
body:
**Adds a progression-based power that removes your mana in exchange for physical enhancements and new abilities. Progress through _5 tiers_ by crafting specific items. Each tier upgrades stats and previously unlocked abilities.**



**Crafting Instructions:**

1. **Bottled Magic**:
    → Drop all *golden food* items on 1 *empty bottle*
2. **Divine Essence**:
    → Drop 1 *Power Reseter* on 1 *Bottled Magic*

> Hold the **Divine Essence in offhand** to either unlock the power or upgrade to the next tier.

 

### **Tiers Overview:**

**Tier 1:**

* **Flash Step (Ability 1):**
   Quick dash forward. Speed & distance improve each tier.
* **Unstable Fist (Ability 2):**
   Marks next hit to deal delayed damage. Upgrades improve damage & AoE.
* **Leap (Ability 3):**
   Launches player upward.

 

**Tier 2:**

* **Concussive Blitz (Ability 4):**
   Multi-hit combo on target. Higher tiers add concussion and more range.

 

**Tier 3:**

* **Parry (Ability 5):**
   Reflects recent damage or stores it briefly for counterattack.

 

**Tier 4:**

* Fully removes all mana.
* **Bloodlust (Ability 6):**
   Highlights nearby enemies. Killing enemies lowers cooldowns further.
* **Unstable Fist → Soul Strike:**
   Drains enemy mana, creates AoE around target that affects nearby entities.
* **Leap → Windstep (if midair):**
   Can now air-step when above ground.

 

**Tier 5:**

* **Ground Crush (Ability 7):**
   2s charge → stomps ground, stuns and knocks back enemies in 8-block radius with wave effect.
* **Soul Strike (Upgraded):**
   Now lasts longer and drains mana from nearby entities too.
